overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Horizon Forbidden West) showing a character exploring a tribal settlement built into red rock formations. The character moves from cave interiors through a decorated gate into open landscape and finally into a village area, with warm sunset lighting throughout.

events.description: character moves from deep cave interior toward the open exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the tribal settlement, observing the bone and wood structures and fire pits

burning fire basket providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character explores a tribal settlement built into a red rock cave. Bone spires and wooden structures line the path, with fire pits providing warm illumination. The character walks toward a visible exit where daylight streams in.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave exit vista point overlooking distant mountains

events.description: exits the cave to open vista with view of distant village and mountains
turns around and re-enters a darker cave tunnel
enters darker tunnel section approaching the decorated jaw gate

agents.ego_description: exiting the cave to survey the landscape, then turning back to enter a narrow passage with a decorated gate

large gate structure decorated with teeth-like bone spikes and red fabric
narrow cave tunnel with rocky walls leading to the exit

segments.scene_description: The character steps out of the cave into a bright open vista revealing distant mountains and a tribal village. After a brief look, the character turns and enters a narrow tunnel passage adorned with a decorative jaw-like gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated cave tunnel leading to open plains

events.description: passes through the decorated jaw gate into open landscape
approaches the village settlement in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel and emerging into the open landscape, passing tribal guards at the exit

tribal guard standing watch at the cave exit

large mountain peaks with snow caps visible in the distance
tribal huts and buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the decorated jaw gate, flanked by two tribal guards, and emerges into a vast open landscape. The terrain transitions from enclosed cave to open grassland with distant mountains and the village settlement visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village center with huts and market stalls

events.description: enters the village settlement with thatched huts and wooden structures
slows to look around the village center before continuing toward the river

agents.ego_description: walking through the village, observing the tribal huts, market stalls, and villagers going about their activities

villager walking through the settlement center

wooden stalls with red and white patterned fabrics displaying goods
burning fire pit in the village center with surrounding seating
river or stream running along the edge of the village

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling tribal village with thatched huts, market stalls, and tribal NPCs. The path winds through the settlement center past a campfire, with wooden scaffolding and decorated structures lining the route. The character continues toward a river visible on the left side of the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a red rock cave into a bright, expansive tribal landscape. It begins by navigating a path lined with bone spires and wooden structures, where the flickering glow of fire pits illuminates the cavern walls. As the character moves forward, the warm interior light gives way to brilliant daylight streaming from the cave's exit. The scene then opens into a wide vista of distant mountains and a sprawling village before the camera turns back toward the rock face. Finally, the movement leads the character through a narrow tunnel passage and under a decorative jaw-like gate structure.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined tribal entrance into a sprawling, bustling settlement set against a vast wilderness. It begins as the character passes through a decorated jaw gate flanked by two guards, emerging from the enclosure of a cave into an expansive landscape of open grasslands and distant mountains. As the camera moves forward, the wide vista narrows into the heart of a tribal village, where the terrain shifts from wild grass to a winding path lined with thatched huts and market stalls. The scene then flows past a central campfire and wooden scaffolding, weaving through the activity of tribal NPCs before finally turning toward a river bordering the edge of the settlement.
